core_identity.essence: A lost Incan citadel high in the Andes, surrounded by mountains and clouds, blending ancient civilization with extreme natural beauty.
core_identity.city_feeling: Machu Picchu feels sacred, mystical, and timeless — a place where history, nature, and silence merge into one emotional experience.

sensory_profile.soundscape: Wind through mountains, distant water streams, silence of ruins, and occasional footsteps on stone paths.
sensory_profile.visual_feeling: Ancient stone terraces, green mountains, clouds moving through ruins, and dramatic Andean landscapes.

match_narratives.high_match: Machu Picchu may deeply resonate with you if you are drawn to mystical places where history and nature merge. You likely enjoy meaningful travel experiences that feel symbolic, emotional, and unforgettable.
match_narratives.medium_match: You may connect with Machu Picchu if you enjoy occasional adventure mixed with cultural discovery and scenic landscapes.
match_narratives.low_match_warning: If you prefer modern cities, nightlife, comfort-based vacations, or easy accessibility, Machu Picchu may feel physically demanding and logistically complex.
match_narratives.emotional_hook: A place where the world feels ancient and alive at the same time.

winter.description: Winter season is quieter with misty conditions that enhance the mystical feeling of the ruins.

spring.description: Spring brings lush greenery and ideal trekking conditions.

summer.description: Summer offers the clearest skies and best visibility of the ruins.

autumn.description: Autumn enhances the mystical and quiet atmosphere of the site.

solo_trip.description: Powerful solo journey of reflection and discovery.

couple_trip.description: Highly emotional and meaningful romantic experience.

creative_escape.description: Extremely inspiring for creativity and storytelling.

digital_nomad_stay.description: Possible in nearby regions, but not site itself.

destination_dna.travel_feeling: Machu Picchu feels like walking inside a memory the earth kept.
